description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/open-source-devex/containers/build:latest with a docker:dind service and defines the variables CONTAINER_NAME, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, and DOCKER_HOST as shown. Define three stages: build, test, and release. Add a build job (stage build) that inherits the global before_script `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} registry.gitlab.com` and runs the command `ci/build.sh`, and configure it to run on all branches except tags. Add a test job (stage test) that also inherits the global before_script and runs `ci/test.sh`, also skipping tag pipelines. Add a release job (stage release) that runs only on the master branch, overrides the before_script with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} registry.gitlab.com`, `/opt/toolbox/users/setup-bot.sh`, and `/opt/toolbox/users/install-ssh-key.sh "${DEVEX_BOT_SSH_KEY}"`, sets the variable GIT_REMOTE to `git@gitlab.com:${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}`, executes `ci/publish-container.sh` and `ci/release.sh`, and runs an after_script `/opt/toolbox/users/cleanup-bot.sh`.
